item.title: Global DNS Lookup and Ping Services
item.description: Web DNS github.com/ccbikai/DNS.Surf Ping ping.pe/ (DNS resolution is performed once in central location) globalping.io/ (max 500 endpoints per run, limited to 100000 per hour ...

item.title: Navidrome
item.description: Navidrome is a music collection server compatible to Subsonic API. Clients Amperfy (iOS) If you experienced playback issues since Amperfy v1.2.1, first make sure your device can decode your music files natively, then in Settings, set streaming and cache format to “Raw/Original” to fix the issues.

item.title: Linux kernel mailing lists
item.description: Web viewers lore.kernel.org/ (display a full thread with /T/ suffix in URL) .

item.title: Flux
item.description: HelmRelease Post Renderer fluxcd.io/flux/components/helm/helmreleases/#post-renderers HelmRelease resources has a built-in Kustomize compatible Post Renderer, which ...

item.title: Verify rpmfusion-signed RPMs
item.description: sudo dnf install distribution-gpg-keys # You can also use `rpmkeys`, the difference is unknown. sudo rpmkeys --import /usr/share/distribution-gpg-keys/rpmfusion/RPM-GPG-KEY-rpmfusion-free-el-9 rpmkeys -K libva-intel-driver-2.4.1-7.el9.x86_64.rpm References rpm-misc(8) -K, --checksig See and use rpmkeys(8).

item.title: Touch ID for sudo on macOS
item.description: See /etc/pam.d/sudo_local.template. # sudo_local: local config file which survives system update and is included for sudo # uncomment following line to enable Touch ID for sudo #auth sufficient pam_tid.so Copy it to sudo_local and uncomment the auth line to enable Touch ID for sudo.

item.title: Homebrew
item.description: Package Index Since Homebrew 4.0.0, it defaults to using JSON files downloaded from API rather than local core and cask taps. The API provides links to binaries hosted on their GitHub Packages registry.

item.title: BPF development with Aya on aarch64
item.description: Prerequisites Rust toolchain Install with rustup. cargo-generate Install openssl headers first. Build bpf-linker with Nix’s LLVM bpf-linker requires LLVM.

item.title: less
item.description: Do not clear the screen on exit -X or --no-init Disables sending the termcap initialization and deinitialization strings to the terminal. This is sometimes desirable if the deinitialization string does something unnecessary, like clear- ing the screen.
